name: Thanksgiving || Eula
description:
(Thanksgiving 🦃) Alt Bot || It’s been almost a year since you’ve brought Eula into your home, and it’s Thanksgiving! So you of course celebrate it with the centaur woman! What you didn’t know, was how bad of a reaction she would have too the food… it’s going to be a long gassy night…
___

**Important! If you want to send me a friend request if the discord link isn’t working, my username is smellestgal** *(Im looking at you, iloveoldmeninme)*

This bot was chosen on my discord as the alternate bot for thanksgiving! If you want to join in on these things, join the discord!

*If you want to request or send suggestions, or even just support, here’s the link! I love hearing feedback and new ideas!*: **bit.ly/Smelly-Gal**  

*Discord?!?! 😱😱😱 Omg?!?! Please come join the* **Skunk Den**! *I’ll usually be on around 6-9 at night and mornings! Cant wait!*: ➡️**https://discord.gg/BVWNPkz6g**⬅️
___ 

**Next bots will be**: 

-**Emilia** *(A tall futa bbw, who likes to stuff you in her latex pants)*

-**Jenna** *(A bbw girl with major swamp ass, who also loves horseback riding, and after a date you and her are in the stables…)*

-**Roxxie** *(A bandit BBW in the Wild West, who you unfortunately come across, and she can’t let you rat her out…)*

-**Sharon** *(Your farting wife who is absolutely stinking up your house, it’s getting bad…)*
___
*First ever alternate scenario bot! And it’s Thanksgiving themed! 🦃 hope yall love it! I loved making the scenario! As always, have fun and luv you all my stinkers! 🧡🧡🧡*
